rule.name: PS_DR_MonthNamesTranslations
rule.description: Requires the number of month as an integer input and returns the translated name of the month
rule.definition: a!match( value: ri!month, equals: 1, then: #"urn:appian:translation-string:v1:13f86dd9-f208-4ff1-8e3d-e6534a79c81b", equals: 2, then: #"urn:appian:translation-string:v1:cc283bd6-8d9e-4212-ad27-dba1589ee622", equals: 3, then: #"urn:appian:translation-string:v1:2f09f000-4006-44f2-80d7-a35d9a5cd8fe", equals: 4, then: #"urn:appian:translation-string:v1:76926efd-a88f-4341-afd8-ea23bd5bc77a", equals: 5, then: #"urn:appian:translation-string:v1:1cd08c61-7532-4f85-ad2c-8d2a7cdd610f", equals: 6, then: #"urn:appian:translation-string:v1:b6c4fb4d-56ea-453c-957c-5cdf9a4d7015", equals: 7, then: #"urn:appian:translation-string:v1:cd88698a-5e20-4173-963a-66c5c580544f", equals: 8, then: #"urn:appian:translation-string:v1:92d36036-e8a8-4578-90be-355444a19ecd", equals: 9, then: #"urn:appian:translation-string:v1:2c2abb38-be0e-4576-9b96-d7950428a64e", equals: 10, then: #"urn:appian:translation-string:v1:b1b1bea1-824d-44d7-9b66-fa36a9a2237f", equals: 11, then: #"urn:appian:translation-string:v1:c59cf260-59fe-40a7-9f08-1c5d42abd938", equals: 12, then: #"urn:appian:translation-string:v1:ebf8f298-9eae-45f8-b6ff-d70b45e36e70", default: #"urn:appian:translation-string:v1:0382ff62-3f06-454d-ba9f-8b04e7d7cb34" )
